title: An Act a petition that the town of Chelmsford be authorized to ban second generation anticoagulant rodenticides within said town

abstracts.abstract: By Representatives Cataldo of Concord and Elliott of Lowell, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4972) of Simon Cataldo and Rodney M. Elliott (by vote of the town) that the town of Chelmsford be authorized to ban second generation anticoagulant rodenticides within said town.  Environment and Natural Resources.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources
the committee on Environment and Natural Resources
